result:
Two approval artifacts written to `runtime/queue/approvals/`:

- **`wire-transfer-m8.md`**: Flags the $9,800 wire transfer request as likely fraud (new account, unknown sender domain, urgency tactics). Asks how to handle.
- **`calendar-conflict-0618.md`**: Surfaces the June 18 17:00 clash between the Northwind call (c5) and Theo pickup (c6), and asks Dana to choose how to resolve it.
